changes.message: Redesigned Settings: clearer scope layout, compact sheet, and tidier map theme headers
Ability range and visual state: clearer rendering and context menu integration for placed abilities
Marker sizes stay synchronized when you move between strategy pages
Rotate placed abilities from the board
Ellipse (circle) drawing tool alongside your existing map markup
Drag role icons onto the map like other utilities
Drag-to-attach agent shapes with full undo/redo support
Import strategies by dropping a folder or ZIP; summaries show what was imported or skipped
Archive manifest import and smoother strategy bundle handling
Dead agent state is preserved and interpolated when changing pages
Agent and ability sizing work together more consistently on the board
Added Miks with abilities and updated vision cone labels
More reliable global shortcuts, delete/hover behavior, and lineup cleanup
Undo/redo behaves correctly when edits go out of bounds
Side switching keeps placements sensible; wall and barrier abilities respect the active side
Improved error reporting and dependency updates
